name: Grupo Elektra S.A.B. de C.V. Re
summary: Grupo Elektra S.A.B. de C.V. is a financial services and specialty retailer company operating in Latin America. It offers financial products and services such as consumer loans, credit cards, and money transfers, along with retail sales of appliances, electronics, furniture, and other consumer goods. The company operates through a network of stores and online platforms, primarily targeting lower-income consumers.
